channel.title: Tom Campbell on Paulo H. Barchi
channel.description: Recent content in Tom Campbell on Paulo H. Barchi

item.title: Six Perspectives on the Ocean of Consciousness
item.description: Matter emerges from consciousness, not the other way around: exploring six different perspectives.

item.title: My Big TOE: 12 Core Diagrams
item.description: A visual summary of Thomas Campbell’s Theory of Everything, exploring the evolution of consciousness, the nature of reality as a simulation, and the path to entropy reduction.
